title: Geo-tagged Garbage Complaint App
text: A technology-driven mobile application for citizens to report garbage accumulation in real-time with 2-hour cleanup target.

latestUpdate.summary: Minister Agnimitra Paul announced a new geo-tagged mobile app for real-time reporting of garbage and civic issues.

title: Mandatory Vande Mataram in Schools & Madrasas
text: Mandatory singing of 'Vande Mataram' during assembly prayers across all state-run schools, aided schools, and recognised madrasas.

latestUpdate.summary: Directorate of Madrasa Education made the singing of Vande Mataram compulsory in all recognized state madrasas.

title: Caste Certificate Re-verification
text: Re-verification of all SC/ST/OBC caste certificates issued since 2011 to identify and cancel fraudulent ones.

latestUpdate.summary: West Bengal government ordered the re-verification of all caste certificates issued since 2011 to address irregularities.

title: Handover of NH Stretches to NHAI
text: Handover of seven national highway (NH) stretches, totaling 196 km, to NHAI and NHIDCL for modernization and widening.

latestUpdate.summary: West Bengal government approved the handover of seven national highway stretches (totaling ~196 km) to NHAI and NHIDCL.

title: Assembly Live Streaming Proposal
text: Proposal by Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari for live streaming of Assembly proceedings, including Question Hour, debates, bills, and budget sessions, to ensure legislative transparency.

latestUpdate.summary: CM Suvendu Adhikari proposed live streaming of Question Hour, debates, bills, and budget sessions for legislative transparency.

title: Prohibition on Media Interactions for Officials
text: Absolute prohibition on government officials, civil servants, and police officers from communicating any document or information to the press without official orders.

latestUpdate.summary: West Bengal government altered the media gag order, limiting restrictions to regular state establishments.

title: Colour-Coded ID Cards at State-Run Hospitals
text: Introduction of colour-coded identity cards for all employees at state-run hospitals to prevent unauthorised entry of middlemen and touts.

latestUpdate.summary: The Health Department is introducing colour-coded identity cards for all state-run hospital staff to prevent unauthorized access by middlemen.

title: Subsidised ₹5 Fish-Rice Canteens
text: Statewide rollout of subsidised fish-and-rice meals priced at ₹5 across approximately 400 dedicated public canteens.

latestUpdate.summary: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari announced the statewide introduction of fish-and-rice meals at a highly subsidised rate of ₹5...

title: Liquor Shop Radius Restrictions
text: New regulations prohibiting liquor shops from operating within a one-kilometre radius of educational institutions and places of worship.

latestUpdate.summary: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari announced strict new regulations prohibiting the operation of liquor shops within a one-...
